arabic: وَعَن أنسٍ قَالَ: كُنَّا إِذَا نَزَلْنَا مَنْزِلًا لَا نُسَبِّحُ حَتَّى نحُلَّ الرِّحالَ. رَوَاهُ أَبُو دَاوُد

english.text:
When we encamped we did not glorify God* till we had loosened the saddles. 

* This is explained as meaning to perform the salat. Cf. Mirqat, iv, 218.

Abu Dawud transmitted it.
